characters.name: Ami Ōnuki
characters.description: Ami ŌnukiFirst episodeLatest episode""Dis-Harmony""""It's Alive!""Voice ActorJanice KawayeKei Kobayashi (Japanese dub)Blanca "Neri" Hualde (Castilian Spanish dub)Leyla Rangel(Latin American Spanish dub)Béatrice Wegnez (French dub)Siri Nilsen (Norwegian dub)Annette Heick (Danish dub)Erika Menezes (Brazilian Portuguese dub)Anca Sigmirean (Romanian dub)Olga Golovanova (Russian Dub)Ami Ōnuki (Herself) (Singing)InformationGenderFemale ♀PronounShe/HerSpeciesHumanAgeAt least 14 (In series)52 (In real life)Eye ColorHot PinkHair ColorHot PinkRelativesGranny (grandmother)Unnamed mother (mentioned)StatusActivePersonalityGirly, goody-two-shoes, sweet, bubbly, pretty, feisty, positive, lovable, vibrant, energetic, cute, immature, strong-willed, peppy, cheerful, childish (at times), ditzy (sometimes), comical, obsessive (sometimes), protective, affectionate, kindOccupationSingerLikeHanging out with Yumi, rainbows, Huggle Buddies cereal toys, girly stuff, animals, dolls, sports, puppies, bunnies, rock music, sushi, attention, dancing, ballet, good behavior, martial arts, Japanese culture, chocolates, ponies, having fun, games, roses, playing dress-up, romance, helping others, respect, wild parties, taffy, bubblegum, snowball fights, cleanliness, teamworkDislikeAnything negative, losing Bunny Huggles, anything gross, being stood up, Harmony, trouble, danger, rejection, being told not to help, vampires, disrespect, selfishness, bad behavior, seeing her friends sad, monsters, humility, being captured, prejudice, making mistakesFriendYumi YoshimuraJulie(Sometimes)Kaz Harada(Manager)EnemyJulieFavorite Music GenreJ-Pop/American PopFavorite ColorPinkFavorite FoodSushiAmiis the animated counterpart ofAmi Ōnuki. She is one of the members withYumi Yoshimuraand one of the two main titular protagonists of theseries. Ami has fair skin, hot pink eyes, and long hot pink hair that goes down to her waist. She also partially ties her hair into buns. She also usually wears a flower hairclip. She has black mascara. She favors the pop music of the '60s and wears an orange, yellow, and bubblegum pink patterned go-go dress that has a white collar with two points, a white belt with an circular buckle in the center, and also carries a daisy flower barrette in her hair on every occasion, a silver-and-emerald bracelet on her right wrist and an orange beaded bracelet on her left wrist, and white knee-high go-go boots with the zipper lying where her feet is located.

characters.name: Atchan
characters.description: AtchanOnly episode"Super Zero!"Voice ActorRob PaulsunInformationGenderMale ♂Eye ColorBlueHair ColorUnknownRelativesUnkownStatusAlivePersonalityHeroic, ClumsyOccupationHeroFriendAmi, Yumi and KazFavorite Music GenreNoneFavorite FoodNoodles Atchanis a childhood friend ofAmiandYumiatCamp Youwannasushi. He made his debut in Super Zero. Atchan wears a big, red helmet looking like a fly with big human ears. His face is white and his right eye has a black star, making him look like a member of the band,KISS. He has a black clown nose. He also wears a grey superhero shirt with red sleeves and yellow gloves. He has a yellow belt. He wears black pants and and yellow boots with red socks. It is exactly like Mangbee Man, Atchan's favourite comic book superhero.

characters.name: Domo
characters.description: DomoFirst episode"Domo"Voice ActorKeone YoungInformationGenderMale ♂SpeciesCaninePersonalityCute,LikeKazDislikeJang Keng and TekiraiFriendKazAmiYumiEnemyJang Keng and Tekirai Domo is a dog who appears to be a white Maltese or Havanese, the most peculiar thing about him is  that looks like his ownerKaz, because they both wear glasses. He doesn't respond to too many thing and looks innocent, But when he sees food he runs to it and eat it all up. In the episode "Domo" Kaz bought Domo as one more pet. He andAmiadore him alot, butYumi,Jang Keng, and Tekiraididn't want him in the bus. They thought that Domo only understands the order "Stay" but when he saw cat food, he ate it from the cats. Later on, Yumi was suppose to look over Domo, but he left the bus, without attention. He goes everywhere to find food, and When Ami, Yumi, and Kaz arrived at a spot Domo was in already, people blame Kaz because they got mixed up with him and Domo, which Kaz cannot see or spot. At the end Kaz signs a contract of money, and Yumi admits that there is no problem having one more pet, yet Jang Keng and Tekirai still refused.

characters.name: El Diablo
characters.description: El Diablo is the toughest bull in all of Mexico. He appears in "Olé!". El Diablo was a large black bull who had defeated and disgraced all of the matadors of Mexico. He was eventually defeated by Kaz, who dressed the tour bus like a bull.

characters.name: Eldwin Blair
characters.description: Eldwin BlairEldwin Blairis the major antagonist of Hi Hi Puffy AmiYumi. He is an English businessman and an enemy of Puffy AmiYumi, especiallyAmi. He is voiced byNathan Carlson. Eldwin looks like a rich gentle man that wears a red and orange suit, green pants and a bowtie. His hair looks like a furball toYumi, and he has a French-looking moustache. Eldwin is a very mean man and doesn't care about nature. He is, instead, always obsessed with building a parking lot somewhere. At first he tried to build is in a farm but fail. Secondly, he cutted down so many trees at arbour day to build one.
characters.personality_section: Eldwin is a very mean man and doesn't care about nature. He is, instead, always obsessed with building a parking lot somewhere. At first he tried to build is in a farm but fail. Secondly, he cutted down so many trees at arbour day to build one.

characters.name: Evil Alternate Universe
characters.description: Evil Alternate UniverseTheEvil Alternate Universeis a hellish dimension and the home ofEvil Ami, Evil Yumi, and Evil Kaz. In this universe, everyone is supposed to be evil. The skies are red and the ground is black. There are demons, stones and pointy black trees and very gloomy weather here. This universe is shown in "Evil AmiYumi", whereYumi Yoshimuragets trapped here after her body absorbs lightning while she tempts fate during a storm. Whether or not the dimension survives whenthe diabolical clonesmeet their apparent demise is unknown, but it has not been featured since, meaning it was destroyed.

characters.name: Granny
characters.description: GrannyInformationGenderFemale ♀PronounShe/herSpeciesHumanAge60Eye ColorBlackHair ColorBlackRelativesAmi Ōnuki(granddaughter)StatusActiveLikeHer granddaugherDislikeHer hair shaved offFavorite ColorUnknownGrannyisAmi's Grandma. She believed that Ami was a wig maker and thatYumiandKazwere her assisstants. Ami lied about being a wig maker because she did not want to give her grandma a heart attack, because according to Ami, she isverytraditional, as she believes things like phones and toothbrushes "steal your soul!". Eventually Ami had to confess to Granny that she's a rockstar, however Granny understood and was proud of Ami since being a rockstar is Ami's passion in life.
